description: Connect Splunk to sync saved searches, indexes, apps, and users for SIEM and log analytics intelligence.

install_fields.label: Splunk Host
install_fields.help: Hostname or IP of your Splunk instance (e.g. splunk.example.com)

install_fields.label: API Token (Bearer token)
install_fields.help: Splunk session token or HTTP Event Collector token. Create in Settings → Tokens.

install_fields.label: Default Index
install_fields.help: Optional default index to scope searches (e.g. main)

install_fields.label: Verify SSL
install_fields.help: Set to 'false' to disable SSL certificate verification (not recommended for production)

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validate host and token via GET /services/server/info

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Check connectivity and return server version

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Sync saved searches, indexes, and apps to knowledge base

methods.name: run_search
methods.description: Run an ad-hoc SPL search and return results
